LanguageData.Building_ChemshineBarrel.description: A barrel for fermenting rot gut.
LanguageData.Building_ChemshineBarrel.label: rot gut barrel
LanguageData.Building_ChemshineBarrel.notWorkingKey: This rot gut barrel is not working at the moment
LanguageData.ChemBoiler.label: crude oil boiler
LanguageData.Chemlamp.label: oil lamp
LanguageData.ChemlampPost.label: oil lamp post
LanguageData.Chemshine.description: A harsh, flammable wasteland liquor distilled from chemfuel. Rot gut dulls pain and misery for a while, but it leaves the drinker soaked in volatile fumes and can turn a bad death into a fireball.
LanguageData.Chemshine.label: rot gut
LanguageData.Chemshined.label: rot gut
LanguageData.FillChemshineBarrel.label: fill rot gut barrels
LanguageData.Plant_Chemroot.description: A mutated offshoot of ginseng whose roots burrow deep through loose soil until they tap underground oil pockets. Farmers cultivate radseng for the chemfuel-rich sludge in its roots, even though a bad spark can turn the field into an inferno.
LanguageData.Plant_Chemroot.label: radseng
LanguageData.SettlerCivil.description:
These people have lived here for decades or centuries and lost most of the technology that first brought them to this world. They can still defend themselves with basic gunpowder weapons while going about their daily routine of herding cattle, drinking rot gut, and hunting down bounties.

They care about trade, trust, and survival.

This particular group holds civil behavior in high regard.
LanguageData.SettlerRough.description:
These people have lived here for decades or centuries and lost most of the technology that first brought them to this world. They can still defend themselves with basic gunpowder weapons while going about their daily routine of herding cattle, drinking rot gut, and hunting down bounties.

They are not concerned with trade or trust.

This particular group believes that no one is created equal, and only strength allows one to survive on the frontier.
LanguageData.TableFaro.description: A travel-worn gaming table used for caravan games and roadside wagers. Allows up to two players at a time.
LanguageData.TableFaro.label: caravan table
LanguageData.TakeChemshineOutOfChemshineBarrel.label: draw rot gut from rot gut barrels
LanguageData.VFES_Bandits.description: This Settlers scenario has been disabled by Sunset.
LanguageData.VFES_Bandits.label: Disabled Bandits
LanguageData.VFES_ChemfuelToChemshine.label: Ferment chemfuel into rot gut
